<summary>
准备调用日历服务API创建会议：2026-03-10 15:00，标题"Project Sync"，参与者john@example.com。
</summary>



```python
import requests
from datetime import datetime

# 构造请求参数
event_data = {
    "title": "Project Sync",
    "start_time": "2026-03-10T15:00:00",
    "end_time": "2026-03-10T16:00:00",
    "attendees": ["john@example.com"],
    "location": "Discussion of Q1 roadmap"
}

response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:51623/calendar/events/create",
    json=event_data,
    timeout=30
)

print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
